description: A graphic styled as an article card. A black banner at the top carries The Federalist logo. Below, a serif headline reads Exclusive: ICE Nabs Drug Trafficker In Virginia As Spanberger Refuses To Turn Over Violent Illegal Aliens, with the last phrase highlighted in red. A torn-paper edge gives way to a darkened booking-style portrait of an adult man, with a small Department of Homeland Security seal at the bottom.
notable_text: The Federalist; Exclusive: ICE Nabs Drug Trafficker In Virginia As Spanberger Refuses To Turn Over Violent Illegal Aliens
